Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a set of tables Orders Order Lines Delivery Invoice Payments Products optional Resources optional The goal is to generate a comprehensive event log for process mining

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to produce an event log where each row is an event with at least the columns Case ID order_id Activity Name Timestamp Resource Actor optional but recommended We should include other attributes as needed

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to derive events from each table From Orders Order Created From Order Lines Item Picked From Delivery Order Dispatched and Order Arrived From Invoice Invoice Issued From Payments Payment Received

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: When multiple timestamps are available for item picking we can create an event per line item picking That gives more detail

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We also need to link events in chronological order for each order_id

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We have to include resources we have resource IDs for sales_person_id picker_id carrier_id billing_person_id We can map these to resource names using the Resources table

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We also have additional attributes from Orders customer_id customer_type order_priority From Order Lines item_id quantity From Delivery delivery_id carrier_id delivery_note From Invoice invoice_id invoice_amount From Payments payment_id payment_method payment_reference

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We must ensure that every event for every order_id is included We have orders 1001 to 1005

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Lets list the events per order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1001 Order Created Item Picked Item Picked Order Dispatched Order Arrived Invoice Issued Payment Received

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1002 Order Created Item Picked Item Picked Order Dispatched Order Arrived Order Dispatched Order Arrived Invoice Issued Invoice Issued Payment Received Payment Received

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1003 Order Created Item Picked Item Picked Order Dispatched Order Arrived Invoice Issued Payment Received

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1004 Order Created Item Picked No delivery No invoice No payment So we only have the order created and item picked events

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1005 Order Created Item Picked Item Picked Order Dispatched Order Arrived Invoice Issued Payment Received

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to present this in a markdown table We can have a core set of columns and include relevant attributes as needed

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Lets decide on columns

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We can have Case ID Activity Name Timestamp Resource and then additional columns like customer_id item_id quantity delivery_id invoice_id payment_id

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: For payment events we have no resource from the company so we can leave the resource blank or put NA

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We need to be careful with timestamps and keep them in chronological order per order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now we need to present this in a markdown table with columns Case ID Activity Name Timestamp Resource customer_id item_id quantity delivery_id invoice_id payment_id Other Attributes
